_comment: Copy to clients.json (gitignored) and fill in real data. One entry per bookkeeping client whose AR you manage. Customer overrides map QBO customer display names to profiles and AP contact details.

clients.remit_to: Example Foods LLC, 123 Main St, Anytown ST 00000
clients.payment_methods: ACH via QuickBooks pay link (preferred), or check to remit address
clients._collections_sender_options: bookkeeper = emails come from you on the client's behalf; owner = you draft, owner sends from their inbox

Anytown Unified School District.invoice_submission: email to ap@anytownusd.example with PO# in subject line
Anytown Unified School District.check_run_schedule: 15th and last business day of month
Anytown Unified School District.notes: Requires W-9 on file before first payment; vendor registration completed 2026-08.
